emails.subject: Congratulations, etc...................
emails.body: Congratulations, etc................... First of all congratulations on your promotion, it is well deserved. You are really in some rarefied air, since there seem to be very few Managing Directors. I also would like to compliment you on putting together one of the best 2 1/2 hour seminars workshops that I have ever attended I know that is saying a mouthful). The Operational Risk Meeting Workshop was not only informative, but the constantly changing formats kept everyone's attention. I believe the meeting also caused a renewed enthusiasm among your supervisory personnel. This is not only my observation, but the feeling of all of the people that I have talked to over the past few weeks. Once again, congrats.!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

emails.subject: Re: Congratulations, etc...................
emails.body: Re: Congratulations, etc................... Thanks for the congratulations. David of course is pleased about the promotion but is most anxious to see what dollars come along with it! Thanks, too, for your comments on the OpRisk session. It is always a risk to pull together an audience of 90 and deliver something worthwhile. --Sally Enron North America Corp. From: Steve Venturatos 01/23/2001 08:24 AM
